projectDescription: A FastAPI-powered intelligent parts catalog system that uses Meta's DINOv2 vision model to enable visual similarity search for industrial machine parts across multiple plant databases.
keyFeatures: Visual similarity search using Meta's DINOv2 ViT-G/14 model
Multi-scale image embedding extraction (448px and 560px scales)
Region-of-interest (ROI) based search for precise part identification
Multi-plant database architecture with per-request routing via x-planta header
pgvector-powered L2 distance similarity search across up to 3 images per part
Hybrid embedding combining global and center-crop views for improved accuracy
Cloudinary integration for optimized image storage and delivery
Rate limiting with slowapi to protect AI inference endpoints
Confidence scoring with distance-based quality levels (Alta/Media/Baja)
Audit logging of search queries with top result tracking
publicApiSurface: POST /piezas/agregar — Add a new part with up to 3 reference images
POST /piezas/buscar/global — Visual search across all parts in the plant
POST /piezas/buscar/maquina — Visual search filtered by machine
GET /piezas/maquina/{maquina_id} — List all parts for a machine
GET /piezas/pieza/{clave} — Get a single part by key
PUT /piezas/piezas/{clave} — Update a part's metadata and images
DELETE /piezas/eliminar/{clave} — Delete a part and its Cloudinary images
